seoTitle: Wyongah vs Yabbra — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Wyongah and Yabbra. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Wyongah and Yabbra.
heading: Wyongah vs Yabbra — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wyongah, New South Wales and Yabbra, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Yabbra has a lower overall climate risk score (42/100) compared to Wyongah (48/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wyongah or Yabbra safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wyongah has a flood risk score of 48/100, while Yabbra scores 31/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wyongah scores 47/100 for bushfire risk. Yabbra scores 61/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wyongah or Yabbra?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Yabbra has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.72% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
